subject: Lunatone, a crescent moon-shaped rock Pokemon with a red eye at center, floating against a dark background with a large full moon behind it
description: A crescent moon-shaped creature with a single prominent red eye floats at the center of the frame. The body is pale gray-tan with a smooth, curved form that mimics the moon's crescent silhouette. Behind it glows a large luminous full moon against a deep dark background. The setting is stark and celestial — no ground, no horizon, just the creature suspended in nocturnal space. The composition is clean and symmetrical, emphasizing the creature's eerie stillness.
foreground: Lunatone floating centrally, crescent body with red eye
background: large full moon glow against dark night sky
